nasb.text: Yet it turned out that as soon as they came inside the city, Ishmael the son of Nethaniah and the men that were with him slaughtered them and cast them into the cistern.

esv.text: When they came into the city, Ishmael the son of Nethaniah and the men with him slaughtered them and cast them into a cistern.

cnv.text: 他們到了城中，尼探雅的兒子以實瑪利和與他一起的人，就把他們殺了，扔在坑裡。

ccb.text: 到了城中，以实玛利和部下便屠杀他们，弃尸于蓄水池中。
